content: Could someone please point me to a list or guide for which the best Wheels are for this choice? Or suggest some?
this
this
and this
Isn't this thais' wheel
I thought it's not in the selector
What is Realm Mastery?
Neither of the red ones are in the general pool.
a stat
I see. Here is the explanation for anyone else wondering:
What is a "Posse" in the Chaos realm mastery explanation?
key skill
that white one in bottom left corner
Oh, thank you. Do you perhaps know why it would be translated as "Posse"?

Actually, I think I figured it out. It seems to relate to law enforcement employing groups of strong men to forcefully supress—which I assume is meant to refer to how the silver energy supresses madness.
You choose depending on awakers you use
Each wheel has a its best fit awaker
But I assume some wheels are more versatile than others.
The purple one posted above is Winkle's wheel, and it's only to be put on Winkle, putting that thing on anyone else is just weird
True, only 1 or 2
Like Nautila/Celeste wheel
Mostly support wheel
The rest is just niche
And needed to be put on their corresponding awaker
Are  you referring to these two?
Yeah
Nautila wheel can be used on any shielder
Celeste wheel is niche
Can be put on her on Leigh
As a fact, you can just put any wheel on anyone, in any faction but ofc faction exclusive effect will be excluded if you are not using corresponding team
Alright, thank you. I will probably wait until I start running into difficult fights to refine my team then. <:dishes:1239911910900764682>
the cn key skill text is an abbreviation and is wrongly translated
can be put on thais<:stoppage:1236938521365839872>
It is then ironic that the word it ended up as can still kind of work, even if it seems quite out of place.
Does it also increase the points given to other Awakeners?
what point
The Aliemus.
The wheel says the user generates more Aliemus. Since you suggested it be used on Thais, I just want to clarify whether it increases the Aliemus given to other characters through her abilities.
yes
Then it seems like it would probably work on Miryam and 24 in lieu of a better SSR wheel for them. <:think:1243504961254326354>
yes
What does this top part mean? What is the "Recharge Level" is it just additional aliemus added onto the effect?
when the user done their yellow skill, recharge some aliemus for the user
So after an ultimate, it gives them a head start?
probably
Alright, thank you.
holy fuv
you can see the exact number how much it will give back to you clicking the 'detail' button on the profile of an awakener
like this
Is "exalt" the special card, or the ultimate?
the ultimate
Okay, thank you for the tip.
Limited awaker isn't applied for anyone
Especially new player
okay
This is a bug right?

i'd recommend erika
everyone has it <:wish:1236951537788649492>
I'm pretty sure I put my Lifewheel on
But when entering the stage
All life wheel on my awakers are gone
probably
ask moderators
Except for the default forced to use Horla
<@1164258265799086080> please help me report to them, this is just weird
Even everything else was nerf to a certain level. My Alva only created 27 shield on her level 6 cards <:flop:1236937860922343466>
Isn't this too harsh
185% death resistance, 5% black sigil drop, this is annoying
same wheel in the same team won’t stack
Did you use the same wheel on your team?
I know that much you know
I said it's disappeared
As you can see no wheel is showing on awaker screen
It's supposed to be like this
Funny enough, my team is full of lv60 and one of them is 70
But it tells me my average level isn't even 55
lv 55 is your account lv
Nah
The first one
Is master level
The second one
Is your average team level
Seem like a bug
The third one is your skills level
Extremely annoying, I tested on others side story last stage too, got the same problem
And I felt like my skill card was at level 1 or something
~~switch to cn language until fixed~~
Would that help lol, lemme try
Wtf
It really is ENgpt bug
lmao
The weirdest bug ever
Hope they fix this soon
Does that mean that mechanically, it still works the same?
What works the same?
If you mean with no bug, yeah, it should be the same
I mean even though it displays things differently, it still works the same in actual combat.
If it works the same I wouldn't complain you know
Isn't that obvious?

It is not obvious. Because if it is telling you certain things in the UI, but doing different things in the background calculations, that is a perfect reason to complain and think that there are also background mechanical problems.
I only complained  because in actual battle it worked like shit
Exactly to what it showed outside
It's stripped everything out with exact number showed on the board
Okay, that is much weirder then. I find it strange that a language change would effect gameplay.
No wonder I fought my ass off last season on nightmare content
And I was thinking at that time: Is it my skills got worse or my team is now crap
Have you considered that perhaps it is a specific card causing the whole problem? Perhaps something went wrong in its translation, causing an error in loading all the cards.
Don't think so, also it's not my problem
Since I clear event content just fine, they still work perfectly
Just not on character story
And some more?
Won't know what work what won't until someone try it
Reading Erika story and is good
all deep sea is getting buffed next patch right <:camera:1239909693044817971>
In Ogier’s profile, Mythag found 2 silver cores
So who is the second one?
Individually, or the realm?
Don't think so
They just add overload ultimate (for the whole realm) and some talents to some permanent characters (Celeste, Faros and Caecus)
